title: 10 health benefits of Pistacia lentiscus (mastich)
intro: Pistacia lentiscus has health benefits such as soothing digestive issues and reducing inflammation. Its medicinal properties include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant compounds. The resin of this plant has been used to treat various ailments, including diarrhea, constipation, and stomach ulcers. For example, mastich can improve gut health by reducing inflammation and promoting the growth of beneficial bacteria, leading to a stronger immune system and reduced symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS).
